description: The fila Agony shoe with its minimal styling is perfect for all off-duty events. Referencing the sport shoe but with added details for weekend comfort, this shoe can be worn with polo tees and jeans.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for heavy structure and great breathabilityStitch detailing with suede overlays on the forefoot to extend durability and enhance shoe structureCentral lacing system with a suede border for a comfortable, customised FitHeavily padded collar and plush tongue for snug fitMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleMade of durable rubber to withstand excessive usagePivot point below the big toe mound and the heel for easy 180 degree foot rotationFlex grooves all over the outsole for added flexibility and tractionShoe careDo not machine washWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
